purpose: To build a functional web platform enabling customers to browse, purchase, and track products, and allowing administrators to manage inventory and users.
roles: End-user who browses, adds items to cart, and places orders.
Internal user responsible for managing products, inventory, and viewing orders.
workflows: {"workflow_name": "Customer Purchase Flow", "steps": ["Browse Catalog -> View Product Details -> Add to Cart -> Review Cart -> Checkout -> Place Order -> Receive Confirmation"]}
{"workflow_name": "Admin Product Update Flow", "steps": ["Login -> Navigate to Product Management -> Select Product -> Update Details/Inventory -> Save"]}
business_rules: A customer must be logged in or provide shipping details to proceed to checkout.
Inventory levels must be checked and decremented upon successful order placement.
Discounts, if applicable, must be validated against the cart total before checkout.
The system must enforce positive quantities for all items.
assumptions: Inventory data can be sample data
Admin authentication can be basic for MVP

functional_requirements.title: Product Catalog Browsing
functional_requirements.description: The system must allow customers to view a browsable list of all available products, with filtering and sorting capabilities.

acceptance_criteria.description: The system must display all active products on the main catalog page.
Users must be able to filter products by category (e.g., Electronics, Apparel).
Users must be able to sort products by price (low to high, high to low) or popularity.

functional_requirements.title: Product Details Viewing
functional_requirements.description: The system must display comprehensive information for a selected product, including images, description, price, and stock availability.

acceptance_criteria.description: The product page must display multiple high-resolution images.
The system must display the current stock level and warn the user if stock is low.
Users must be able to select product variations (e.g., size, color) and view the updated price/SKU.

functional_requirements.title: Shopping Cart Management
functional_requirements.description: The system must allow authenticated users to add, modify, and remove items from a persistent shopping cart.

acceptance_criteria.description: Users must be able to add a specified quantity of a product to the cart.
Users must be able to update the quantity of an item already in the cart.
Users must be able to remove items entirely from the cart.

functional_requirements.title: Checkout Process
functional_requirements.description: The system must guide the user through the checkout steps: shipping information, shipping method selection, and payment details.

acceptance_criteria.description: The system must validate required shipping fields (address, zip code, etc.).
The system must calculate estimated shipping costs based on the selected method and destination.
The system must display a final order summary including subtotal, tax, shipping, and total.

functional_requirements.title: Order Placement
functional_requirements.description: The system must process the final transaction, reserving inventory and generating a unique order record.

acceptance_criteria.description: Upon successful payment (mocked), the system must generate a unique Order ID.
The system must decrement the inventory count for all purchased items.
The system must send an order confirmation email/message to the customer.

functional_requirements.title: Order History Viewing
functional_requirements.description: The system must allow logged-in customers to view a list of their past orders and their current status.

acceptance_criteria.description: The customer must see the Order ID, date, total amount, and current status (e.g., Processing, Shipped, Delivered).
The customer must be able to view the detailed items and costs for any past order.

functional_requirements.title: Admin Product Management
functional_requirements.description: The Admin user must be able to create, read, update, and delete product listings and manage associated inventory.

acceptance_criteria.description: Admin must be able to add a new product, including name, description, price, and initial stock count.
Admin must be able to update the stock level of any existing product.
Admin must be able to mark a product as 'Inactive' to remove it from the public catalog.

non_functional_requirements.description: The platform must load critical pages (Catalog, Product Detail) quickly to ensure a positive user experience.

acceptance_criteria.description: The main catalog page must load completely within 3 seconds under normal network conditions.
API calls for adding items to the cart must respond within 500 milliseconds.

non_functional_requirements.description: The platform must protect user data and transaction integrity.

acceptance_criteria.description: All user authentication endpoints must enforce password hashing (e.g., bcrypt).
Sensitive data (e.g., addresses, order details) must be transmitted over HTTPS.

non_functional_requirements.description: The platform must be intuitive and accessible to first-time users.

acceptance_criteria.description: The site must be fully responsive and functional on major mobile and desktop screen sizes.
The checkout process must be achievable in the minimum number of clicks possible.

use_cases.title: Browse and Select Product
preconditions: User is on the homepage or catalog page.
main_flow: User views the list of results.
User clicks on a product listing.
System displays the Product Detail Page (PDP).
alternative_flows: User navigates back to the catalog list.
User selects a variation (size/color) and adds the item to the cart.

use_cases.title: Place Order
preconditions: The shopping cart contains at least one item.
main_flow: User selects shipping method and reviews costs.
System processes payment, updates inventory, and creates the order record.
alternative_flows: If payment fails, the system displays an error and allows retry.
If inventory is insufficient, the system alerts the user and removes the item from the cart.

use_cases.title: Manage Product Inventory
preconditions: Admin user is logged in with appropriate permissions.
main_flow: Admin navigates to the Product Management dashboard.
Admin selects a product to modify.
Admin updates product details (description, price, stock).
alternative_flows: Admin creates a new product listing.
